# expo-push-easy
> Universal push notification library for Expo Push and FCM v1. Works in Node.js, Convex, Cloudflare Workers, Bun, and Deno.

## Overview
- [Landing Page](https://expo-push-easy-docs.vercel.app/): Official documentation and getting started guide for expo-push-easy.

## Quick Start
Install: `npm install expo-push-easy`

```js
import { send } from 'expo-push-easy';

// Expo Push
await send({ token: 'ExponentPushToken[xxx]', title: 'Hello', body: 'World' });

// FCM v1 (auto-detected)
await send({ token: 'fcm-device-token', title: 'Hi', body: 'Android', fcm: { serviceAccount } });
```

## Key Exports
- `send(token, options)` — Universal push. Auto-detects Expo Push vs FCM.
- `sendBatch(messages)` — Send multiple notifications at once.
- `sendExpoPush(token, options)` — Direct Expo Push API call.
- `sendFcm(token, options)` — Direct FCM v1 HTTP API call.
- `registerForPushNotifications()` — Client helper for Expo apps.
- `onTokenRefresh(handler)` — Listen for push token changes.

## Runtime Support
- Node.js: send, sendBatch, scheduling, adapters
- Convex: send, sendBatch, scheduling, adapters
- Cloudflare Workers: send, sendBatch
- Bun: send, sendBatch, scheduling, adapters
- Deno: send, sendBatch, scheduling, adapters

## FCM Auth
No googleapis or jsonwebtoken dependencies. Just provide a Google service account JSON and expo-push-easy handles JWT generation automatically.

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/yohanbcn/expo-push-easy)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/expo-push-easy)
